question: B-003-crossfamily-drift
claim: Versioned calibration baseline is the asset; drift score = clamp01(cos(baseline,anchor)-cos(current,anchor)); NEVER auto-rebaseline (anti drift-laundering). Internal thresholdSignals are recomputed live each call with NO anchor/baseline persisted.

question: B-003-crossfamily-drift
claim: Union-with-authoring-model closes the two-hop launder: a producer must not score off its own authored content. Internal explicit_author evidence (explicit.ts:320) feeds rank/dedup (fusion.ts:173,464) with no producer-vs-scored-skill check.

question: B-003-crossfamily-drift
claim: Same-family = hyphen-boundary prefix + closed vendor-root table; unverifiable->same (fails closed to the riskier path). Internal cluster dedup treats near-sibling skills (cli-claude-code/cli-codex/cli-opencode) as INDEPENDENT evidence (keyed on phrase-anchor only, no family collapse).

question: B-003-crossfamily-drift
claim: Named-skip taxonomy (baselines_needed / stale-model / awaiting-first-behavior / thin) — never a forced max score or fabricated alarm. Internal signalReason collapses to low_sample_excluded/sample_concentration_excluded only (no stale-embedder-space or needs-baseline distinction).

question: B-003-crossfamily-drift
claim: New high-trust-proximate feedback admitted but RANK-SUNK a bounded window so the detector looks before it gains influence; off-cursor stamp preserves replay. Internal calibration applies correction/acceptance pressure immediately (no time-gate on new signals).

question: B-003-crossfamily-drift
claim: Content-addressed warning row id over (block, baseline epoch, score decile) so re-detect dedups to no-op, only decile escalation re-warns. Internal speckitMetrics gauges emit every call with no content-addressed dedup/decile gate.

question: B-003-crossfamily-drift
claim: TWO orthogonal NEW families opened (provenance-contamination + temporal-drift), zero overlap with C1-C5/QCR. Real local contamination surface: sibling skills (cli-*) treated as independent evidence + author: path with no producer check. Leads: attested-baseline (H/L) + author-self-boost-guard. Both need durable cross-session state the tmpdir JSONL lacks. newInfoRatio 0.85.
